title: Grandma Gift Cards
description: I want a gift card appropriate for my grandmother—easy to redeem, perhaps e‑gift, and that matches her interests.
narrative: The user seeks gift cards suitable for a senior recipient: they should be simple for an older adult to use, with clear, paper‑less convenience (e.g., Amazon or local e‑gift), options for personalization (custom messages, designs), a reasonable value and a reasonable validity period (ideally one year). Relevant documents are those describing e‑gift cards from Mademoiselle Sissi, Amazon, Smartbox, or other vendors that highlight user‑friendly redemption, custom messages, and suitable categories (e.g., local craft shops, experiences, or general retail).

title: Lambs apartment rental
description: Search for apartments available for rent in the town of Lambs, Normandy, near Saint‑Lô, with details on price, size, number of rooms and amenities.
narrative: The user is planning to relocate to the Lambs area in Normandy and wants to find suitable rental apartments. They require listings that include up‑to‑date information on rent (monthly price), unit size (in square metres), room count, whether the unit is furnished, availability of parking or cellar, heating details, and proximity to public transport or local services. Documents that give these specific details are considered relevant. Listings lacking the essential criteria or describing unrelated properties, such as recipes or market descriptions, are not relevant.

title: Lotus Elise E85
description: What are the expected performance characteristics and maintenance requirements for a Lotus Elise T14 running on E85 fuel?
narrative: The user is a Lotus Elise owner or prospective buyer who intends to power the car with E85 biofuel. They need to understand how E85 influences horsepower, torque, fuel economy, engine wear and tuning, as well as required diagnostic checks and potential system adjustments (e.g., air‑fuel ratio, ECU re‑flash, injectors, timing). Relevance is judged by documents that discuss the Elise T14, E85 fuel usage, performance data, maintenance procedures, error code listings, and ECU or sensor calibration related to E85 operation.

title: Pork Colombo & Farm Poultry
description: How can I prepare a coconut‑milk pork curry using local ingredients and also find farm‑fresh poultry nearby?
narrative: The user is planning a dinner that features a pork Colombo with coconut milk and may wish to pair it with other poultry dishes sourced from a nearby farm. They need a clear recipe with ingredient sourcing, cooking steps, and advice on matching complementary poultry options. Documents that provide recipe details and information about local farm poultry farms satisfy this need.

title: Choosing Vehicle Sun Protection
description: What should I consider when selecting a window tint or sun protection product for my car and my child?
narrative: I need comparative information on film types (e.g., Medium Smoked 25 % vs Extreme Clear 70 %) that balance heat reduction, UV blocking, and interior glare reduction while meeting French legal limits (minimum 70 % visible light on front windows). Additionally, I want details on child‑safe options that protect against harmful UV rays and reduce glare for safe driving, as well as installation guidance and cost considerations. The topic is relevant to documents describing Peugeot 307 tinted‐film kits, legal regulations, UV protection statistics, and baby sunscreen products.

title: Pirate Crew Sizing
description: What is the typical crew size on a pirate ship, and how does it compare to crew requirements on modern service vessels?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the number of men aboard historical pirate vessels and wants to compare these figures with crew numbers or staffing needs of contemporary maritime service vessels such as tugboats, dredgers, and cable‑laying ships. Relevance requires documents that provide quantitative crew data for pirate ships, explanations of crew roles on service vessels, and comparative analyses or references to manning guidelines. Documents lacking crew data or focusing on unrelated topics such as rowing or vessel sales are irrelevant.

title: Used Car Energy
description: Which used cars in Switzerland are classified with the new 2020 WLTP energy label and meet specific CO2 emission thresholds?
narrative: The user is a prospective buyer who wants to assess used vehicles based on their environmental impact. They are specifically looking for listings in Switzerland that provide the updated energy label (A, B, C, D…) according to the 2020 WLTP test procedure, and that specify the CO₂ emission figure for the car. Relevance requires that a document contains the energy‑label category, the WLTP CO₂ value, and confirms the vehicle is used. Documents that lack energy‑label data, refer only to the new label in abstract terms, or discuss new‑vehicle emissions without listing used cars are considered not relevant.

title: Boys in Schools
description: What evidence exists regarding the treatment of boys in modern schools and what policy responses have been suggested?
narrative: The user wants a balanced analysis of claims that boys are disadvantaged in today’s educational system.  They require sources that document perceived disparities—such as reduced academic support, stricter behavioral expectations, curricular gaps, and school‐based statistics—alongside viewpoints from students, parents, and teachers about these issues.  In addition, the user seeks to explore proposed reforms (e.g., gender‑equitable curricula, teacher training, and alternative disciplinary models), together with evidence of their outcomes or critiques.  Relevance is determined by the presence of empirical data, policy discussions, and counter‑arguments that collectively illuminate both the problem and potential solutions.

title: CPF Training Eligibility
description: How can I use my Personal Training Account to finance a specific training, and what are the eligibility conditions and procedures?
narrative: The user is a job seeker or employee who wants to upgrade professional skills and is looking for a detailed guide on how to use their CPF credits to finance a training course. They need to know which courses are CPF‑eligible, how to check their accrued rights on the My Account portal, the step‑by‑step application process, the possibility of combining CPF credits with other funding (e.g., AIF or complementary contributions), and how the funding is applied and deducted. Relevance is judged by documents that provide explicit instructions on eligibility criteria, online portal navigation, credit verification, course selection, and funding procedure details, including references to policy documents and procedural webpages."}

title: Custom House Construction France
description: What are the complete steps, contractual requirements, and energy regulations for building a custom detached house in France?
narrative: The user is planning to build a new detached home and seeks a comprehensive overview that covers land acquisition, selection of a builder, the construction contract process (including the CCMI and guarantees), and compliance with RT2012 energy standards. Relevant documents should provide details on builder services, legal and financial aspects, thermal certification, and examples of real‑estate listings that illustrate typical costs and layouts. Irrelevant content (e.g., insurance apps, unrelated contracts) should be excluded.

title: EV Lease vs Buy Cost
description: What are the total cost of ownership differences between leasing and buying an electric vehicle in Europe, including subsidies, maintenance, and long‑term resale value?
narrative: The user is a mid‑sized family considering an electric car and wants to evaluate whether leasing or purchasing is more economical over a 5‑year period. Relevance criteria include up‑to‑date information on EU subsidies, tax incentives, leasing contracts, battery maintenance, insurance differences, and projected resale values for common EV models.

title: Late Blight Resistances
description: What potato varieties are genetically resistant to late blight and suitable for low‑pesticide organic cultivation?
narrative: I am a potato grower considering adopting new varieties in France that combine strong late blight resistance with acceptable agronomic traits for organic production. I seek a summary of the latest resistant cultivars, their breeding backgrounds, field performance data, and guidance on integrating them into low‑chemical management practices.

title: Google Earth Installation
description: How can I troubleshoot and reinstall Google Earth Pro on a Windows computer when it fails to start?
narrative: The user is seeking specific guidance on resolving launch failures of Google Earth Pro, including accurate steps for uninstalling the current installation, handling potential legacy files or registry entries, reinstalling the correct version, verifying required dependencies or system settings, and interpreting error logs. Relevance is judged by content that provides actionable troubleshooting instructions, installation procedures, or common error‑fix solutions related to Google Earth Pro on Windows.

title: UK GDPR Data Breach Compliance
description: What legal duties, reporting deadlines, and penalties do UK companies face after a GDPR‑level data breach, and how can they mitigate liability and ensure compliance?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive, up‑to‑date understanding of the legal landscape surrounding data breaches in the United Kingdom.  Specifically, they want to know the statutory obligations under the UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018, including the definition of a breach, the 72‑hour notification requirement to the Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO), the duty to notify affected individuals when the breach poses a high risk, and the range of regulatory sanctions (up to £17.5 million or 4 % of annual turnover).  They also want insights into cross‑border considerations—such as how Irish or EU partner companies are involved, the impact of the UK‑EU Data Sharing Agreements, and how the “UK‑portioned” part of the ECHR or EU data‑protection jurisprudence might be applied.  Relevant documents should provide legal analysis, case law, or guidance from regulatory bodies; documents that merely discuss generic cyber‑security or privacy best practices without reference to UK GDPR enforcement or penalty regimes are considered non‑relevant.}

title: Sniper 5 Availability
description: Where can I legally stream or download the film "Sniper 5: Inheritance"?
narrative: The user is looking for legitimate, up‑to‑date sources to watch or obtain the movie "Sniper 5: Inheritance," including options for online streaming platforms, digital purchase or rental, and physical media availability. Relevance requires that the documents provide specific, verifiable links or service names, mention legal licensing, and note availability in the user’s region (e.g., French or European releases).

title: Reconstruction Cost Estimation
description: How can I accurately estimate my home reconstruction costs for insurance coverage?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on estimating reconstruction costs for home insurance. They want to understand whether to rely on annual appraisals, inflation adjustments, market conditions, and other factors that affect the accuracy of the estimate. Relevance requires documents that discuss realistic cost estimation, inflation, annual assessments, and insurance policy renewal practices. Irrelevant topics such as political news, sports, or unrelated health forums are not pertinent.

title: Rendez‑vous broadcast info
description: Where and when can I watch the latest episodes of Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu, and how can I access them online?
narrative: The user is a French TV viewer who wants up‑to‑date, practical information about the scheduling, airing networks and online availability of the program Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu.  Relevant documents should contain details on broadcast times (e.g., 8:50 p.m. slot), the channels that currently air the series (France 2, France 5, Club RTL), the availability of re‑plays on platforms such as Pluzz, information on live companion shows (Retour en terre inconnu), and any updates on upcoming episode releases or season schedules.  Documents that provide unrelated content such as tourism itineraries, dream interpretation, subscription‑model discussions (e.g., Dreuz) or other non‑program‑related material should be considered irrelevant.

title: Potato Baking Choices
description: What potato varieties and preparation methods provide the best texture and taste when baking whole potatoes?
narrative: The user is investigating how specific potato varieties—such as Monalisa, Bintje, and others—along with their agronomic traits (yield, resistance, tuber size) and culinary characteristics (dry matter, cooking behavior) influence the outcome of baked potatoes. Relevant documents include variety profiles, post‑registration results, and detailed cooking‑time tables for baking and steaming. The user seeks to combine variety selection with optimal baking methods and times to achieve desired mouthfeel and flavor, so only documents that discuss variety traits, cooking methods, and baking times are considered relevant.

title: Christian Julia Exhibitions
description: Where and when are exhibitions of Christian Julia’s photographic work taking place, and what venues or themes are involved?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on recent and upcoming exhibitions that showcase Christian Julia’s photography—including portraiture, sport, and mural projects. The user wants details such as exhibition names, dates, locations, themes, and any related press releases or event descriptions. Documents that mention specific exhibition titles or venues, precise dates, and thematic context will be considered relevant; general biographical or unrelated content will be deemed irrelevant.

title: Ohm Energy Off‑Peak Choice
description: Is Ohm Energy’s off‑peak tariff for Linky users better for my evening‑and‑weekend electricity consumption than EDF?
narrative: The user is a household with a Linky meter who mainly uses electricity during off‑peak hours (evenings and weekends) and wants to assess whether Ohm Energy’s specific tariff, with a higher off‑peak discount but higher peak price, offers overall savings compared to EDF, taking into account the tax‑free subscription, green‑electricity add‑on, and customer service quality. Relevance requires that documents discuss Ohm Energy’s tariff structure, Linky‑dependent offers, consumption‑based discounts, comparison to EDF, and real‑world customer feedback.

title: Kia Bongo 3 Parts
description: Which OEM and aftermarket spare parts are available for a 2015 Kia Bongo 3 and what are the typical prices?
narrative: The user is a small‑business owner who operates a fleet of Kia Bongo 3 trucks. They need a detailed, up‑to‑date list of spare parts—including battery protection boxes, suspension components, tyres, and any parts specific to the 2.9‑liter engine variant—along with price ranges in local currency. The user also wants information on where to purchase: authorized dealer inventories, authorized online shops, and reputable aftermarket suppliers, including any known discounts or bulk‑purchase options. Relevance is determined by documents that provide explicit part numbers or identifiers, pricing data, supplier details, and user reviews or comments related to the Bongo 3.

title: Gallic Women in Resistance
description: What roles did Gallic women play in resisting Caesar's conquest and how did they influence military, political, and cultural aspects?
narrative: The user is researching the extent and nature of women's participation in the Gallic resistance against Roman forces, looking for historical anecdotes, evidence of combat involvement, leadership in councils, and their legacy in symbols such as the Gallic rooster. Relevance criteria include accounts of women as soldiers, commanders, council members, druidesses, events such as Gergovie, and mention of symbolic representation post‑conquest.

title: US Car Rental Guide
description: I need a comprehensive guide covering car rental options, pricing, permit requirements, age restrictions, insurance, and fuel cost planning for a road trip in the United States.
narrative: The user is planning a U.S. road trip and wants detailed, practical information about renting a car across major U.S. cities. Relevance includes documents that explain how to compare prices, the necessity of an international driving license or U.S. licence, minimum age and extra fees for young drivers, insurance coverage, and how to estimate gasoline costs and fuel prices along the route.

title: Pula Van Rental
description: What are the options, costs, and requirements for renting a van at Pula Airport (PUY) for a group travel?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on van‑class car rentals at Pula Airport: vehicle models (e.g., Volkswagen Touran), daily prices, age limits, necessary documents, pickup/drop‑off procedures, optional one‑way rentals, insurance coverage, fuel costs, and agency ratings. Relevance is judged by presence of specific van rental details at Pula Airport, not generic car or parking information.

title: Eating Diseased Produce
description: Are tomatoes and potatoes infected with downy mildew safe to eat, store, and can be used for canning?
narrative: The user is looking for a nuanced assessment of the food safety implications of consuming tomatoes and potatoes that show symptoms of downy mildew (and similar late‑blight conditions). Relevance is indicated by discussions of health risks (e.g., solanine in green or sprouted tubers, the lack of scientific consensus on safety, potential pH changes affecting canning), practical handling instructions (cutting off infected parts, storage conditions, composting or discarding recommendations), and guidance on whether the produce can be safely cooked, stored long‑term, re‑planted, or processed into canned goods.

title: Irancy Estate Visits
description: What are the visiting hours, wine offerings, and organic viticulture practices at the Irancy vineyards in Northern Burgundy?
narrative: The user seeks specific, up‑to‑date information for planning a visit to Irancy vineyards. Relevance is judged by documents that provide current opening times for tastings, details on the vineyards and climates (e.g., Les Mazelots, Vaupessiot, Palotte, Mouroux), the type of grapes (Pinot Noir, Caïsen), and information on organic practices and wine prices. Non‑relevant materials such as general historical overviews, unrelated business reports, or unrelated tourist events are excluded.

title: Eco-Responsible Boat Shoes
description: What are the key features, sustainability credentials and buying options for modern eco‑responsible boat shoes from European brands?
narrative: The user is looking to purchase a boat shoe that not only offers comfort and style but also meets stringent environmental standards. Relevance criteria include detailed information on leather sourcing (e.g., better leather, certified tannery), environmental certifications (Silver/Gold, LWG rankings), production details (hand‑sewn, eco‑responsible materials), size availability, shipping and return policies, and comparisons among brands such as Timberland, Paraboot, Botalo, and similar. Documents covering these aspects are considered relevant, while unrelated listings, ad impressions or non‑sustainable merchandise are omitted.

title: Renault Modus Rim Embellishment Replacement
description: How to remove and replace the rim embellishments (decorative rim covers) on a Renault Modus.
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, step‑by‑step guide to safely remove damaged rim embellishments from a Renault Modus, identify where the embellishments are located, select appropriate replacement parts (matching size, colour and style), and understand the tools and techniques required. Relevance is judged by the presence of instructions on removal procedures, identification of replacement options, and practical tips specific to the Modus model and its trim levels.

title: Corfu Travel Bundle
description: Find a cost‑effective travel package to Corfu that includes a discounted cruise and a car rental promotion.
narrative: The user wants an integrated deal for a trip to Corfu, specifically looking for cruise discounts (e.g., up to 10 %) and car‑hire promotions (e.g., up to 13 %). Relevance requires documents mentioning Corfu, cruise discounts, car‑rentals, or combined travel promotions; documents purely about other locations or unrelated content are not relevant.

title: Reunion Car Rental
description: Which car rental agencies in La Reunion offer free cancellation and unlimited mileage, and what are the price ranges for economy and intermediate cars?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to La Reunion and wants to rent a car.  They need to compare local car rental agencies based on specific policies: free cancellation, unlimited mileage, and affordable pricing for economy and intermediate vehicles.  Relevant information includes agency names, price per day, cancellation policies, mileage terms, pick‑up locations, and any age restrictions or driver fees.  Non‑relevant content such as rentals in Bari, Portugal, or other destinations is outside the scope of this query.

title: Future Builders Assessment
description: How can high‑school students in Lincoln use the Gallup BP10 Builder Profile 10 to discover entrepreneurial talent and find community support?
narrative: The user is an educator or student in Lincoln seeking tools and resources to identify and nurture future builders. They need details on the BP10 assessment content, eligibility criteria, how to participate in the Future Builders Challenge, event schedules (Inspiration Rally, Boot Camps, Pitch Competition), partnership organizations (Prosper Lincoln, UNL, communities), and potential benefits such as scholarships and mentorship. Relevance is judged by documents that explain the assessment, eligibility, events, and supportive outcomes for students.

title: Motorcycle Accident Causes
description: What are the common causes, injury patterns, and legal implications of motorcycle accidents involving collisions with cars in Europe and the U.S.?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on motorcycle–car collision incidents, including contributing factors such as loss of control, visibility issues, or driver negligence; typical injury outcomes (spinal, limb, head injuries); and legal aspects like fault determination and compensation procedures. Relevant documents should describe specific accidents, their causes, and legal/medical outcomes; non‑relevant documents that only discuss general insurance terms, unrelated vehicle types, or unrelated legal matters should be excluded.

title: Bordeaux Weekend Events
description: What activities and events are happening in Bordeaux on the weekend of 8–10 June 2018?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive list of the happenings in Bordeaux for that specific weekend: the epicures on the Tourny aisles, the Pop Factory pop‑up boutique, the Casa Corona bar, the free sports adventure in Bordeaux Lac, any concerts (e.g., Mariah Carey’s 11 Jun show and the Indochina concert on 4 Jun) and other ancillary events such as exhibitions or food stalls. Relevance is defined by events occurring on those dates in Bordeaux, including venue details, times, and any special notes (like “ephemeral” or “free”). Non‑bordeaux or unrelated topics—for example political news, other cities, or unrelated cultural festivals—are to be ignored.

title: Health and Property in Indre‑et‑Loire
description: I need current COVID‑19 data for Indre‑et‑Loire and information on land for sale and holiday rentals in the area.
narrative: The user is evaluating Indre‑et‑Loire as a potential location for investment or vacation and wants a quick snapshot of the department’s health situation (case counts, hospitalizations, deaths) as well as real‑estate options (available plots for sale and holiday‑let properties). Relevant documents must provide up‑to‑date COVID statistics for Indre‑et‑Loire and listings of land or holiday rental properties within that department. Documents that supply crime data for other departments, unrelated real‑estate listings outside Indre‑et‑Loire, or non‑health topics are considered irrelevant.

title: Wonderbox Voucher Dispute
description: What steps can I take to resolve a dispute over a Wonderbox voucher that I cannot use, was lost, or for which I am seeking a refund or compensation?
narrative: The user has already attempted to contact Wonderbox customer service without satisfaction and is looking for a clear roadmap to resolve the issue. They want to know the relevant consumer protection rights, how to engage the mediator (via mediateur@wonderbox.fr or the CNPM mediation service), what documentation is required, possible outcomes (refund, replacement voucher, credit), and any legal avenues if mediation fails. The topic should trigger sources that explain the company’s refund policy, mediation process, and consumer rights under French law for gift vouchers.

title: Historic Montreal Office Lease
description: I am looking for information on leasing old office spaces in Montreal that feature historic architecture such as brick walls, high ceilings, and large windows.
narrative: The user wants leasing options for historically styled office spaces in Montreal, specifically old Montréal addresses with brick walls, high ceilings, and large windows. Relevant information must describe available spaces, pricing, location relative to metro, parking, amenities, and must reference leasing terms and historic properties. Exclude modern office spaces or non-Montreal listings.

title: Photographic Book Production
description: How can a photographer plan, design and produce a unique photographic book that balances analog heritage and digital technology?
narrative: The user seeks practical guidance and theoretical insights for creating distinctive photographic books. Relevance criteria include documents that describe unique photography in a digital age, contact sheet creation, book design and layout, printing formats (e.g., 10x15, 15x21, etc.), workflow references, and contemporary photographic literature such as *Analog Algorithm – Landscapes of Machine Learning* and *Making Photographs in the Age of Ubiquity*.

title: Quiche Variations
description: Looking for a detailed guide on how to make Lorenen and leek quiches, including ingredient substitutions, dough options, cooking tips, and community‑based adjustments.
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive recipe reference that covers both traditional Lorraine quiche (with ham and lardons) and a leek‑based version, along with vegetarian alternatives, egg‑substitution ideas, dough choices (broken vs. ready‑to‑roll), baking times, and tips from forum comments (e.g., blanching lardons, adding mustard, using nutmeg).  They want to compare steps, ingredients, and potential adaptations for dietary restrictions, and also want practical advice on achieving the right texture and flavor.

title: Kid-Friendly Car Games
description: Which free, online car games are suitable for children, provide safe content, require no download or registration, and include a variety of racing and simulation options?
narrative: The user wants a curated list of car-themed online games that are safe and appropriate for children. They are specifically looking for free games that can be played directly in a web browser without the need to download or create an account. The content should be age‑friendly (no violence or mature themes), and the games should cover multiple vehicle types—such as rally cars, circuit racers, motorcycles, and trucks—to offer diverse play experiences. Documents that only discuss adult racing titles, require downloads or sign‑ups, or are not rated as child‑safe will be considered irrelevant.

title: Mobility Budget Calculations
description: How can an employer calculate and implement a mobility budget for its employees under the French Sustainable Mobility Package?
narrative: The user seeks a step‑by‑step guide to determine eligibility criteria, compute the budget based on the former company car, allocate funds across the three mobility pillars, and understand the tax and accounting implications. Relevant documents discuss the 2020 mobility budget rules, the Sustainable Mobility Package (up to €500/employee/year), calculation methods, and employer‑employee responsibilities.

title: SFR Nevers Outages
description: What are the causes, time‑frames, and resolution reports for recent SFR service outages in Nevers, France?
narrative: The user wants detailed, up‑to‑date information about SFR’s internet/telecom service disruptions in the city of Nevers. Relevant documents include real‑time outage logs, user complaints on social media, SFR support responses, and regional news reports. Documents reporting unrelated SFR topics (e.g., video‑on‑demand offerings), other companies’ services, or unrelated fiction are considered non‑relevant.

title: Oil Lamp Safety Guide
description: What specific precautions and best practices should I follow when using an oil lamp at home?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed, practical information on safely operating an oil lamp: which oils to use, how to prepare and maintain the wick, temperature control, placement to avoid fire hazards, and steps to follow during installation and daily use. The relevance criterion is content that provides concrete safety guidelines, historical context on lamp design that impacts safety, and practical tips for preventing accidents, rather than general descriptions or unrelated lamp accessories.

title: Montreal Villa
description: Looking for a 4+ bedroom, 2+ garage villa near Parc Marguerite-Bourgeoys in Montreal for investment.
narrative: The user wants to locate real‑estate listings that match specific investment criteria: at least four bedrooms, four bathrooms, two garages, a large living area (~390 m²), and proximity to Parc Marguerite‑Bourgeoys in Montreal. Relevant documents contain property details, prices, and investment context, while unrelated material such as car‑rental information is irrelevant.

title: Potato Production Risks
description: I want to understand the environmental and health risks associated with modern potato farming and consumption, especially concerning late blight and dietary impacts for diabetics.
narrative: The user seeks documents that describe both agricultural practices for potatoes (soil preparation, machinery, disease control such as late blight) and their downstream health effects (glycemic index, suitability for diabetics). Relevance is based on coverage of production techniques, pest/disease management strategies, and nutritional/health implications that are directly linked to farm practices.

title: Return‑to‑Work Bonus Eligibility
description: Which conditions allow a French worker to claim the return‑to‑work bonus after securing a new employment contract?
narrative: I just found a new job and want to know if I can receive the return‑to‑work bonus from CAF. I need to understand the eligibility rules: (1) the required duration of the contract and hours worked; (2) whether the contract type matters (CDI, CDD, interim, etc.); (3) how prior benefit status (RMI/RSA, unemployment benefits, etc.) or a recent period of inactivity influences eligibility; (4) the legal threshold for claiming the bonus (e.g., minimum 1 month of work for DDA beneficiaries, 4 months for others); (5) the exact procedure to apply (required documents, timing of application after contract start, whether additional allowances can be combined).
